title: justicia rostellaria
intro: Justicia rostellaria, also known as the hairy justicia or hairy snoutflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Justicia rostellaria include its ability to soothe digestive disorders, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Justicia rostellaria include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol.
